---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for a gitpush-mod mod
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Godimas101
---

## Which mod?

- **Mod:** <!-- e.g. Not Just For Looks -->
- **Game:** <!-- Space Engineers | MechWarrior 5: Mercenaries -->

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the feature. What should it do, and what problem does it solve for you? -->

## Why? (the "what for")

<!-- What situation would this help you with? Concrete examples land better than abstract requests. -->

## Have you seen this done in another mod?

<!-- Optional. Links or names of mods that do something similar help a lot. -->

## Rough shape of the idea

<!-- Even a bad first sketch is useful. UI mockup, block behavior description, one-line summary — whatever helps convey the intent. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Priority, alternatives you've considered, whether you'd be willing to help test, etc. -->
